title: STAGE.1
overview: Yuya’s career is about to go down in flames! But he may have a ghost of a chance if he lets Asahi possess his body and do the hard work for him.

title: STAGE.2
overview: Yuya’s attitude change catches everyone off guard and it’s all thanks to Asahi’s intervention! But his luck may turn when she insists he does things without her help.

title: STAGE.3
overview: Asahi and Yuya need to learn more about each other to succeed. Which begs the question: how well does Asahi know Yoshino, the other half of ZINGS, anyway?

title: STAGE.4
overview: Yuya has dedicated and loyal fans, but only one of them can win the coveted prize they all seek. May the truest fan win!

title: STAGE.5
overview: ZINGS has the honor of attending Farmer's Handsome this year and meet the members of Cgrass! They seem nice enough, but there’s something about their leader, Hikaru, though.

title: STAGE.6
overview: Hikaru accuses Yuya of plagiarizing the late Asahi’s performances and demands that he quit being an idol!

title: STAGE.7
overview: Hikaru is following Yuya’s every move so he can expose that fraud for what he truly is. It’s not like he’s turning a fan or anything!

title: STAGE.8
overview: Yuya’s fans must make a life-altering decision: what should he wear during his photo shoots? No matter the outcome, it is not a choice they can make lightly.

title: STAGE.9
overview: Yuya finds himself on the cusp of an important realization as ZINGS’ second anniversary concert approaches.

title: STAGE.10
overview: Yuya understands what Asahi and Yoshino don’t: ZINGS doesn’t have two members. It has three.
